picks.analysis: SMCI scores +18 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Narrative (+7), reinforced by Fundamentals (+6). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Earnings Surprise (+2, +34.5%), Guidance (+2, +26.0%). Cutting the other way: Analyst Price Target (-1, -20% to $37.13), RSI 14 (-1, 80.0). Within Technology we gave SMCI a +18 and DELL a +15 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take SMCI calls over DELL calls, mainly on Fundamentals (+6 vs +5) and Technicals (+2 vs +1). The suggested calls sit ~28.6% OTM with 48d to expiry, delta 0.31, mid $2.88 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.

reasons.mechanical: Watch for a put-volume spike or fresh put open interest here — smart money hedging ahead of the break.

reasons.technical: A daily close below $166.52 (-8.0%) breaks the structure driving the call — the chart says the move is over. Don't hold a long call under broken support.
reasons.fundamental: A guidance cut or a macro risk-off rotation is what usually drives price here — exit, don't average down.
reasons.mechanical: A surge in put buying / put-call pushing back above ~1.25 confirms the turn.
reasons.narrative: If "AI Software & Cloud Adoption" flips against the trade, the reason for the position is gone — exit on the narrative, not the chart.

levels.prose: A close below round number $165.00 breaks the structure the trade is built on.
levels.proseAi: Cut the position if structure breaks below $166.52 on a daily close, indicating the move is over.

triggers: Exit before earnings (2026-06-18): the post-report IV crush can erase a long premium even when the direction is right.
Time stop: don't carry into the final week before Jul 16 '26 — theta accelerates and the breakeven move gets harder each day.
Thesis check: if a higher-scoring setup appears or the original reason for the trade stops being true, rotate out regardless of price.
exitPlan.overviewAi: This trade targets a breakout above $181, with profit-taking at key resistance levels and a defined stop-loss if support fails.

picks.analysis: ACN scores +15 — a Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+6), reinforced by Narrative (+6). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +7.3%), Sector Narrative (+2, tailwind). Cutting the other way: Support/Resistance (-1, ±2.1% to R). Within Technology we gave ACN a +15 and SHOP a +14 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take ACN calls over SHOP calls, mainly on Mechanicals (+3 vs -1) and Fundamentals (+6 vs +4). The suggested calls sit ~10.5% OTM with 48d to expiry, delta 0.33, mid $5.85 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
